headline: Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) Screens as a Strong Affordable Growth Candidate
summary: The Trade Desk (TTD) passes the 'Affordable Growth' screen, offering strong earnings expansion without an excessive price tag. With a low P/E of 11.84, zero debt, and double-digit growth, it's a textbook GARP opportunity.

headline: Why The Trade Desk (TTD) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of digital advertising platform The Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) fell 7.8% in the morning session after the stock continued to pull back as it released first-quarter 2026 financial results that featured an earnings miss, weak forward guidance, and a subsequent wave of analyst downgrades.
